sentiment: The distance between what we build and what we mean is where everything that matters actually lives.

stories.title: Why Japanese companies do so many different things
stories.summary: The breadth of purpose across Japanese firms feels like a corrective — not chaos, but a refusal to let efficiency become the only metric.

stories.title: Shipping a laptop to a refugee camp in Uganda
stories.summary: Someone actually did the thing. Not a framework, not a thread — a real box, crossing borders, arriving somewhere it matters.

stories.title: Project Glasswing: An Initial Update
stories.summary: A research post with the honesty of a rough draft. Not polished. Not sure. Real enough to mean something.
